ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artists_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist(s) associated with the song */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song on a scale of 0 to 100 */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has explicit content */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0 to 11, where 0 = C, 1 = C#/Db, etc.) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0 = minor, 1 = major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0.0 to 1.0, representing the positivity of the song) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the song was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artists_id FOREIGN KEY ("artists_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist is associated with */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist on a scale of 0 to 100 */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist the album belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the album was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the album was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the genre was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the genre was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content manager, artist) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the song */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, play, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist-song relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist-song relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists_users" (
  "playlist_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the playlist-user relationship */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the playlist */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist-user relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist-user relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_users_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist-genre relationship */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-genre relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-genre relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_albums" (
  "artist_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist-album relationship */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-album relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-album relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the song-genre relationship */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the song-genre relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the song-genre relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-playlist relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-playlist relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-playlist relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-favorite relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "favorited_date" TEXT /* Date the song was marked as a favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-favorite relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-favorite relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-follow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed another user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-follow relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-follow relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-rating relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "rated_date" TEXT /* Date the user rated the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-rating relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-rating relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playback" (
  "playback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-playback relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "played_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was played by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-playback relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-playback relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_playback" (
  "artist_playback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist-playback relationship */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "played_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-playback relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist-playback relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_playback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_playback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_playback_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recomendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-recommendation relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the song was recommended */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-recommendation relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-recommendation relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recomendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recomendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-feedback relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request, praise) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-feedback relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-feedback relationship was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_versions" (
  "song_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the song version */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the song version was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the song version was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_versions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_versions" (
  "artist_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist version */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist version was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist version was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_versions_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_versions" (
  "album_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the album version */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the album version was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the album version was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_versions_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., access, modification) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the log was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
